title: No rain, No snow
description: Remove the rain its sound and the snow. (Classic Edition)
body:
# Classic Edition
**_No rain, No snow_ (Classic Edition)** removes rain and snow particles as well as rain sounds :
```
weather.rain
weather.rain.above
```
# FullBright
An official FullBright is available to improve visibility during rain or thunderstorms.
- [Modrinth Page (public)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fullbright-for-no-rain,-no-snow)
